executive_summary: FairSight reviewed this dataset and any associated predictions for differences in outcomes across protected groups. The bias risk score summarizes how many fairness checks failed and how severe the gaps appear to be.
The findings below highlight which groups are affected, why the issue matters, and which remediation steps can reduce risk before deployment or policy use.

flagged_issues.explanation: The unprivileged group receives the positive outcome at 0.0% the rate of the privileged group. The 80% rule (four-fifths rule) is a widely used legal standard.
The gap in positive outcome rates between F and M is -1.000. Larger gaps suggest unequal access to beneficial outcomes.

Similar individuals receive the same outcome 62.0% of the time. Lower scores suggest the system treats comparable people inconsistently.

Average odds differ by -0.444; this combines false-positive and true-positive gaps.
Precision differs by -1.000, meaning one group's positive predictions are more reliable.

The largest gap across true-positive and false-positive rates is 1.000.
Calibration error differs by 0.265, showing score confidence is not equally reliable across groups.

recommendations.title: Disparate Impact Ratio remediation
recommendations.summary: Pre-processing: reweighing samples is recommended because Disparate Impact Ratio flagged a fairness gap affecting F. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from aif360.algorithms.preprocessing import Reweighing
rw = Reweighing(unprivileged_groups=unprivileged_groups, privileged_groups=privileged_groups)
dataset_transformed = rw.fit_transform(dataset)

recommendations.title: Statistical Parity Difference remediation
recommendations.summary: Pre-processing: disparate impact remover is recommended because Statistical Parity Difference flagged a fairness gap affecting F. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from aif360.algorithms.preprocessing import DisparateImpactRemover
repairer = DisparateImpactRemover(repair_level=0.8)
dataset_transformed = repairer.fit_transform(dataset)

recommendations.title: Individual Fairness Score remediation
recommendations.summary: In-processing: adversarial debiasing is recommended because Individual Fairness Score flagged a fairness gap affecting overall. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from aif360.algorithms.inprocessing import AdversarialDebiasing
debiaser = AdversarialDebiasing(
    privileged_groups=privileged_groups,
    unprivileged_groups=unprivileged_groups,
    scope_name='fairsight_debiasing'
)
debiaser.fit(dataset)

recommendations.title: Equal Opportunity Difference remediation
recommendations.summary: Post-processing: threshold optimizer is recommended because Equal Opportunity Difference flagged a fairness gap affecting F. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from fairlearn.postprocessing import ThresholdOptimizer
optimizer = ThresholdOptimizer(estimator=model, constraints='equal_opportunity')
optimizer.fit(X_train, y_train, sensitive_features=sensitive_features)

recommendations.title: Average Odds Difference remediation
recommendations.summary: Post-processing: equalized odds is recommended because Average Odds Difference flagged a fairness gap affecting F. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from aif360.algorithms.postprocessing import EqOddsPostprocessing
postprocessor = EqOddsPostprocessing(unprivileged_groups=unprivileged_groups, privileged_groups=privileged_groups)
adjusted = postprocessor.fit_predict(dataset_true, dataset_pred)

recommendations.title: Predictive Parity Difference remediation
recommendations.summary: In-processing: prejudice remover regularizer is recommended because Predictive Parity Difference flagged a fairness gap affecting F. The simulated result shows how the metric could move closer to the configured threshold.
recommendations.code_snippet:
from aif360.algorithms.inprocessing import PrejudiceRemover
model = PrejudiceRemover(sensitive_attr='protected_attribute', eta=25.0)
model.fit(dataset)
